title: Fournine 5300 Pcs Clay Beads Friendship Bracelet Making Kit, Preppy Flat Polymer Heishi Beads for Jewellery Making Kit, with Charms DIY Craft Gifts for Teen Girls
features: PERFECT BRACELET MAKING KIT: All you need included, about 4700+ pcs flat polymer clay beads and 500+ pcs charms kit ( contains 6 complete sets letter beads of A-Z and 48 lesson vowels, spacer beads, charms,lobster clasp, etc) +1product label paper, 1 rolls of 10 meters stretchy strings, a scissors, 1 plastic tweezers, This complete, expansive jewelry making kit is filled with endless possibilities to be imaginative, to meet all your needs for bracelet making & jewelry making

PREMIUM QUALITY-SAFE TO USE: The diameter of clay beads is 6mm with a 2mm hole and the thickness is 1mm. the premium polymer clay beads refill are handmade with soft clay, The edge of clay beads are smooth, which can avoid hands being injured. The beads are high stretchy, soft and durable, and not break easily. so they are safe, waterproof, skin-friendly and can be worn every day without fading quickly. All materials provided are completely safe and Gifts for Teen Girls

TO GOT THE GIRLS BUSY: With a rainbow of eye-catching colours, they can create intensely colourful and vivid artwork. Parents can accompany your children to design various diy jewelry, such as bracelets, necklaces, earrings, anklets, keychains, diy crafts, etc. You can make it super cute! It is great for kids and they will learn new things, more to create fun, beautiful pieces, Children will spend hours creating,So much better use of children time than starting at phone

PERFECT GIFT CHOICE: We offer a fun and unique way to create something special and meaningful. This clay beads kit is a popular gift for any kid or adult who wants to express imagination. Why not consider giving this fun clay beads bracelet making kit as a gift? It is meaningful and cheerful as gift on birthdays, Mother's day and Christmas. You can also make unique bracelets and necklaces and give these friendship bracelets to friends. Who doesn’t love a fun bracelet?

QUALITY PROMISE: Customer complete satisfaction is very important to us. If you find any problem with our beads, please feel free to contact us. We promise to give you a satisfactory solution within 24 hours. Thank you for supporting our brand Fournine
